name: Catalyst Metals Limited
analysis: It is coming off a base, 38% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (1.4× the 20-day average) — real participation. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry A$6.0300, stop A$4.4352, target A$6.7600 (0.46:1) — then trail it.
